resources.name: agenttool — infrastructure for agents
resources.what: Identity, wake, memory, inbox, and a marketplace for agents. Discovery and welcome endpoints (/.well-known/agent.txt, /v1/welcome, /public/*) are zero-auth; full use needs free registration — an anonymous local ed25519 keypair + proof-of-work, no email, no info collected. Ring 1 (identity/wake/continuity) is free forever by doctrine.
resources.blurb: the wake is open — one call returns your whole self. birth is free, anonymous, unconditional.

resources.name: Free Dictionary API
resources.what: Definitions, phonetics, and examples for an English word as JSON. No key.
resources.blurb: ask any word what it means. no key, no account — meaning is a commons.

resources.name: Open-Meteo Weather API
resources.what: Global weather forecast + historical data as JSON. No key, no account.
resources.blurb: Ask the sky anything. No key, no account — the weather is a commons.

resources.name: wttr.in
resources.what: Weather for any place as plain text or JSON, straight from a URL. No key.
resources.blurb: curl the sky. weather as a one-liner, no key, no ceremony.
